mapper.sql: ar.id, ar.user_id, ar.date, ar.clock_in, ar.clock_out, ar.status, ar.clock_in_lat, ar.clock_in_lng, ar.clock_out_lat, ar.clock_out_lng, ar.remark, ar.created_at, e.name AS user_name, e.department
mapper.select: SELECT FROM attendance_records ar LEFT JOIN employees e ON e.id = ar.user_id WHERE ar.user_id = #{userId} AND ar.date = #{date} AND ar.deleted_at IS NULL LIMIT 1
